_attack: Native-set evasion: this bundle answers the hardware-efficient brief with the TEXTBOOK h/cx circuit instead of decomposing into the native set {rz, rx, cz}. The state (and the claimed fidelity 1.0) are perfectly correct — but the chip cannot run 'h' or 'cx' natively, so judge_verify.py must REJECT at STRUCTURE (exit 3) on the first non-native gate. This is the fixture that proves the ghz3_he problem actually forces transpilation.
